description: The ColorDialogInterface component is generated by the game when a user interacts with choosing a color.

fields.ItemName: The name of this color dialogue
fields.SpawningUser: The user that spawned the dialouge
fields.SpawningUserID: The field containing the User ID of the person that spawned the dialogue
fields.IsInstance: Whether this dialogue was spawned by the game (true) or spawned from inventory (false)
fields.TargetColor: The color this color editor is editing.
fields.Continuous: Whether changes to the color should instantly update the target color.
fields.AllowAlpha: Whether the color editor should allow transparency modification
fields.AllowHDR: Whether this color editor should allow for making colors beyond 100%.

usage: Attach to a slot or use an existing one by the game. Modifying this component and its hiearchy and its slots allow for making a custom version. To make it your default, follow the page on Favorites.
